all.en: Last weekend, I invited eight friends to my apartment for a potluck dinner party.
all.zh: 上週末，我邀請了八位朋友到我的公寓參加一場百樂餐聚會。

all.en: I asked each guest to bring one dish so that nobody would have to cook too much.
all.zh: 我請每位客人帶一道菜，這樣就不會有人煮得太辛苦。

all.en: To make sure we did not end up with five salads, I created a shared online list.
all.zh: 為了避免最後出現五份沙拉，我建立了一份線上共享清單。

all.en: My contribution was a roasted chicken with lemon, garlic, and fresh herbs from my balcony.
all.zh: 我貢獻的是用檸檬、大蒜與陽台上香草烤製的烤雞。

all.en: Sarah brought a colorful Greek salad, while Tom showed up with homemade dumplings.
all.zh: 莎拉帶來色彩繽紛的希臘沙拉，湯姆則帶了自製水餃。

all.en: My neighbor surprised everyone with a giant pot of spicy Thai curry and jasmine rice.
all.zh: 我的鄰居帶來一大鍋辣味泰式咖哩與茉莉香米，讓大家大為驚喜。

all.en: We arranged all the dishes on a long table so that everyone could serve themselves.
all.zh: 我們把所有菜餚擺在一張長桌上，讓大家可以自助取用。

all.en: The variety of flavors was amazing, and nobody left the table feeling hungry.
all.zh: 風味多元得令人驚嘆，沒有人離開餐桌時還覺得餓。

all.en: After dinner, we played board games and shared stories until almost midnight.
all.zh: 晚餐後，我們玩桌遊、分享故事，幾乎玩到午夜。

all.en: Cleaning up was easy because each guest took home their own empty containers.
all.zh: 清理工作很輕鬆，因為每位客人都把自己的空容器帶回家。

all.en: Everyone agreed that potlucks are a relaxing and affordable way to enjoy time together.
all.zh: 大家一致認為，百樂餐是一種輕鬆又經濟的相聚方式。
